title: Add Next.js auth middleware for route protection
description: Create a Next.js middleware file that protects routes by validating JWT tokens from the Authorization Bearer header. Must support route exclusion patterns (e.g., /login, /register) and return 401 with error message for missing/invalid tokens. Should attach decoded user payload to request context on success and pass valid requests through unchanged. Should reuse the existing JwtService from src/auth/jwt-service.ts and follow the pattern established in src/middleware/request-logger.ts and src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts which export proper Next.js middleware functions taking NextRequest and returning NextResponse.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts: Next.js middleware pattern with NextRequest/NextResponse, excludePaths support, and middleware factory function
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts: Next.js middleware pattern with config-based route exclusion and keyResolver for flexible identification
src/auth/jwt-service.ts: JWT signing and verification with TokenPayload containing userId, email, role, sessionId, generation
src/auth/_auth.ts: extractBearerToken helper for parsing Authorization header
